target.title: fix(thinking): let authoritative provider profiles override stale catalog reasoning=false
target.body:
## Summary

Fixes #84880. Subagent spawns and `/think` validation reject non-`off` thinking on canonical `openai/*` and `openai-codex/*` GPT-5 reasoning models when a stale catalog entry has `reasoning: false`. `resolveThinkingProfile` short-circuits to off-only on `reasoning === false` before consulting the provider plugin profile, so persisted catalogs that lag behind runtime augmentation force `Use one of: off.` even for models the provider knows support `high`/`xhigh`.

Introduces an `overridesCatalogReasoning?: boolean` flag on `ProviderThinkingProfile`. When a provider returns a profile with this flag set, the resolver treats the plugin as the canonical source and uses its level list ahead of the catalog opt-out. Providers opt in **per model**, so non-reasoning models (e.g. `openai/chat-latest`) still honor catalog `reasoning: false`.

The OpenAI extension opts in for GPT-5 reasoning model refs (`gpt-5`, `gpt-5.5`, `gpt-5.4`, `gpt-5.3`, `gpt-5.2`, codex variants, mini/nano/pro, o1/o3/o4 series); chat-latest variants are explicitly excluded. The fix lives in the shared `buildOpenAIThinkingProfile`, so both `openai` and `openai-codex` providers benefit.

## What changes

- **`src/plugins/provider-thinking.types.ts`** — add `overridesCatalogReasoning?: boolean` to `ProviderThinkingProfile`.
- **`src/auto-reply/thinking.ts`** — reorder `resolveThinkingProfile`: when the plugin profile is authoritative, it wins over catalog `reasoning: false`; otherwise the existing off-only short-circuit applies.
- **`extensions/openai/thinking-policy.ts`** — flag reasoning model refs as authoritative via `isOpenAIReasoningModelId`. Non-reasoning chat variants (`chat-latest`, `gpt-5-chat-latest`) are explicitly excluded.
- **`docs/tools/thinking.md`** and **`docs/plugins/sdk-migration.md`** — document the new opt-in flag.
- **`docs/.generated/plugin-sdk-api-baseline.sha256`** — regenerated via `pnpm plugin-sdk:api:gen`.

## Acceptance tests from #84880

Added tests in `src/auto-reply/thinking.test.ts` covering the three acceptance scenarios from the issue:

1. `sessions_spawn(model=openai/gpt-5.4, thinking=high)` → accepted ✅
2. `sessions_spawn(model=openai-codex/gpt-5.5, thinking=high)` → accepted ✅
3. `sessions_spawn(model=openai-codex/gpt-5.5, thinking=xhigh)` → accepted ✅
4. Non-authoritative provider profiles still defer to catalog `reasoning: false` ✅
5. Non-reasoning OpenAI models (`chat-latest`) still off-only on stale catalog ✅

Added tests in `extensions/openai/openai-provider.test.ts` verifying the `overridesCatalogReasoning` flag is set for `gpt-5.5`, `gpt-5.4`, `gpt-5.4-mini`, `o3-mini`, and not set for `chat-latest`, `gpt-5-chat-latest`, `gpt-4.1`.

## Test plan

- [x] `pnpm vitest run src/auto-reply/thinking.test.ts` — 39 passed (5 new)
- [x] `pnpm vitest run extensions/openai/openai-provider.test.ts` — 23 passed (1 new)
- [x] `pnpm vitest run src/auto-reply/ extensions/openai/ extensions/codex/ src/agents/agent-command.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/directive-handling.impl.test.ts` — 1336 passed
- [x] `pnpm tsgo:all` — clean
- [x] `pnpm lint:core` — clean
- [x] `pnpm lint:extensions` — clean
- [x] `pnpm plugin-sdk:api:gen && pnpm plugin-sdk:api:check` — baseline regenerated and verified

## Notes

- Related to PR #84902 (NianJiuZst), which takes the same architectural direction. This PR is an independent, cleaner attempt with additional test coverage tailored to the exact repro cases reported in #84880. Happy to defer to or close in favor of #84902 if maintainers prefer that thread.
- This does **not** address the Ollama Cloud variant raised by @SplyzerRB in #84880; that path forwards `thinking` even when the explicit spawn arg is `off`, which is a separate bug. The fix here only addresses the canonical OpenAI/Codex case the issue title covers.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
